landing.title: Home
landing.app_description: A comprehensive system maintenance tool tailored for Linux and Arch-based distributions. Keep your system clean, fast, and optimized.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Customize application behavior, set maintenance thresholds, and manage custom scan paths.

corpse_cleaner.title: Corpse Cleaner
corpse_cleaner.description: Deep scan for leftover configuration and data directories from applications that are no longer installed on your system.

boot_audit.title: Boot Audit
boot_audit.description: Identify and carefully remove ghost boot entries pointing to missing files on your EFI partition. Warning: Deleting active entries will break your boot process! Only remove old UUIDs or obsolete OS titles.
boot_audit.placeholder_unscanned: Click 'Scan EFI' to audit boot entries.
boot_audit.placeholder_empty: No ghost entries found. Your EFI is clean.
boot_audit.confirm_description: You are about to permanently delete EFI boot variables from your system motherboard. If you remove the entry your system is currently using to boot, your computer will fail to start on next reboot. Are you absolutely sure?

clean_system.title: Clean System Files
clean_system.description: Safely remove package caches, system logs, and orphan dependencies to reclaim valuable disk space.

maintain_system.title: System Maintenance
maintain_system.description: Advanced tools to check system health, repair package manager locks, and manage failed system services.

scripts.title: Custom Scripts
scripts.description: Execute your own maintenance and automation scripts safely through the Maintainer interface.

selection.tooltip_recommended: Safe recommended tasks for regular use.
